serverInfo.name: Astrology Engine
serverInfo.description: Trustworthy multi-tradition astrology. 19 modes, 3 traditions, 18 MCP tools. Deterministic ephemeris — zero hallucinated positions.

tools.name: get_astrology_chart
tools.description: Calculate an astrological chart based on birth data.

tools.name: get_astrology_reference
tools.description: Retrieve interpretation guidelines for an astrological system.

tools.name: save_profile
tools.description: Save a birth profile for future sessions.

tools.name: geocode_city
tools.description: Get lat/lng/timezone for a city name.

tools.name: get_solar_return
tools.description: Calculate solar return chart for annual forecasts.

tools.name: get_lunar_return
tools.description: Calculate lunar return chart for monthly forecasts.

tools.name: get_compatibility
tools.description: Calculate 0-100 compatibility scoring between two people.

tools.name: get_moon_phase
tools.description: Get moon phase and upcoming lunar events.

tools.name: get_numerology
tools.description: Calculate Life Path, Personal Year, Expression numbers.

tools.name: get_planetary_return
tools.description: Calculate planetary return for any planet.

tools.name: get_transit_aspects
tools.description: Get transit-to-natal aspects with impact ratings.
